case_title: POGGI,PIETRO GIACOMO VS CITIBANK -MARINA BRANCH AS AGENT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POGGI,PIETRO GIACOMO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITIBANK -MARINA BRANCH AS AGENT CITIBANK IS TO REMOVE PLFT'S NAME FROM CHEXSYSTEM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $353.19 FILED BY POGGI,PIETRO GIACOMO AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK -MARINA BRANCH AS AGENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK -MARINA BRANCH AS AGENT
